query:
INSERT INTO tasks (id, project_id, title, description, status, parent_workspace_id, created_at, updated_at)
               VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, 'todo', $5, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
               RETURNING id as "id!: Uuid",
                         project_id as "project_id!: Uuid",
                         title,
                         description,
                         status as "status!: TaskStatus",
                         parent_workspace_id as "parent_workspace_id: Uuid",
                         created_at as "created_at!: DateTime<Utc>",
                         updated_at as "updated_at!: DateTime<Utc>"
